scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.setup: corepack enable && corepack pnpm install && corepack pnpm run db:push && corepack pnpm run seed
scripts.build: corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm -r --if-present run build && rm -rf artifacts/api-server/public/assets && cp -r artifacts/godsview-dashboard/dist/public/. artifacts/api-server/public
scripts.clean:generated: git restore artifacts/api-server/dist artifacts/api-server/public/index.html artifacts/api-server/public/assets && git clean -fd artifacts/api-server/public/assets
scripts.verify:prod: corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run test && corepack pnpm run build && corepack pnpm run clean:generated
scripts.verify:release: corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run test && corepack pnpm run build && START_SERVER_LOCAL=1 REQUIRE_HTTP=1 RUN_BUILD_CHECKS=0 RUN_SMOKE_TESTS=0 INCLUDE_PREFLIGHT=0 corepack pnpm run deploy:readiness && corepack pnpm run clean:generated
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run typecheck:libs && corepack pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
